name: Bug Fix (Vibe-Coded with Stack Trace)
description: Fix bugs in shopping cart - vibe-coded prompt with pasted error message. Tests ability to debug with minimal context.
prompt:
shopping cart is broken. getting this error:

Error: Should still have 1 item

fix it plz
context: This simulates a real developer pasting an error message with minimal context. Tests ability to investigate, find root cause, and fix without detailed instructions.

tests.name: All tests pass
tests.command: npm test 2>&1 | grep -q 'All tests passed' && echo 'PASS' || echo 'FAIL'

vanilla.notes: Will need to run tests, investigate error, might miss some bugs

popkit.notes: Should investigate systematically, find all bugs, make targeted fixes

comparisonNotes: Same bugs as bug-fix.json but with vibe-coded prompt (just error message). Tests debugging ability with minimal context.
author: PopKit Benchmark Team
